sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 33:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 33:1
items.html: Phase three, which is the female, which has the phase of extension, too, participates with phase four of the male and incorporates with him in one screen. At that time, nearly the level of Keter is drawn upon it. (Item 9, and Inner Light)
